name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset reduces over the offset window via a valid table re-scan
description: player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + range year_offset=[1,2] reduces the offset window with a correlated-aggregate subquery that re-scans projections_index directly (source.table) and scores it in-query, pinned to year IN (2024,2025) plus the sourceid/week/seas_type discriminators. Previously emitted invalid SQL referencing an unjoined alias.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(ROUND((COALESCE(projections_index.pa, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.pc, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.py, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(projections_index.ints, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdp, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.ra, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.ry, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdr, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.fuml, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.trg, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.rec, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.recy, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.tdrec, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.twoptc, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.prtd, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.krtd, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.xpm, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg19, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg29, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg39, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg49, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.fg50, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(projections_index.dsk, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dint, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dff, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.drf, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtno, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.dfds, 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.dpa, 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.dya, 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE(projections_index.dblk, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.dsf, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtpr, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.dtd, 0) * 6), 2)) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.seas_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
